1843690.name: Darkion
1843690.description:
Experience unique and thrilling competitive PvP battles with your friends in Darkion, a free-to-play fantasy game that combines skill-based combat with summoning powerful creatures to fight alongside you. Work together with other players to complete the campaign and earn legendary items, which you can then trade with other players for profit.

ABOUT THE CHARACTERS

Darkion's universe is filled with diverse and fascinating characters from different cultures and time periods, all brought together in the same battlefield due to the absence of the angel guardian responsible for maintaining the linear flow of time.

Players can choose to play as a variety of historical warriors, each with their own unique abilities and strengths. For example, you can become a fierce samurai warrior from 15th century Japan, wielding a katana and mastering the art of combat with incredible precision. Alternatively, you can embody a Redcoat musketeer from the British Empire of the year 1780, equipped with a musket and ready to defend your kingdom with honor and bravery.

These are just a few examples of the many characters available in Darkion, each with their own backstory and abilities. Whether you prefer the agility of a ninja, the strength of a Viking warrior, or the cunning of a pirate, there is a character in Darkion that will suit your playstyle and preferences.

Choose your character wisely, master their unique abilities, and team up with other players to dominate the battlefield and emerge victorious in Darkion's epic battles.

ABOUT THE ENTITIES

In Darkion, players have the ability to summon powerful entities to fight alongside them in battle. These entities can be summoned mid-battle and are controlled through a radial menu that allows players to issue a variety of commands.

Entities vary in their abilities and intelligence levels, and each has a unique set of commands available to them. Some entities possess a high level of intelligence, allowing players to command them to focus on specific enemies or set up deadly ambushes in certain areas of the map. However, entities with lower intelligence levels can be less discerning and may attack indiscriminately, including friendly players, unless commanded otherwise.

Environmental factors can also affect the strength and effectiveness of entities. Some entities are stronger near water or fire sources, while others are more effective during certain times of day or under specific weather conditions. For example, entities that can fly can be commanded to perform aerial attacks on the enemy team, providing players with a strategic advantage in battle.

Overall, the ability to summon and command entities adds a new level of strategy and depth to Darkion's gameplay, allowing players to customize their approach to battle and adapt to changing circumstances on the battlefield.

ABOUT THE TECH

Darkion is built with cutting-edge technology, including the latest version of Unreal Engine 5 and features like Nanite, Lumen, and MetaHumans from Epic Games.

GAME SOUNDS

Our use of Microsoft's Project Acoustics technology allows for physics sound wave simulations that create immersive game audio never heard before.
In addition, Darkion features proximity voice chat that simulates realistic sound wave absorption in different environments.

This means that the location of your player within the game environment affects how other players hear your voice, creating an incredibly immersive experience.

Darkion is a game like no other, combining innovative technology with thrilling gameplay for an unforgettable experience.
1843690.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 瑞典语*, 希伯来语*, 挪威语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
